self._started_at = time.time()
        self._running = False
        self._log_lines: list[str] = []

    def _log(self, msg: str) -> None:
        ts = time.strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S")
        line = f"{ts} {msg}"
        self._log_lines.append(line)
        # Keep last 100 lines
        if len(self._log_lines) > 100:
            self._log_lines = self._log_lines[-100:]
        logger.info(msg)
